patterns.operational_definition: Decoder-only self-attention perfects syntactic citation formatting while collapsing causal links to source texts; measured as cross-attention causality weight < 0.01 during beam search with ablated source features.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Causal attribution weight via attention gradient ablation; halt-vs-hallucinate ratio during source-ablation beam search
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Standard decoder-only model (e.g., GPT-class) achieves <0.001 causal fidelity to source text in RAG pipeline; encoder-decoder cross-attention achieves >0.85
empirical_support: arXiv:2512.10561 - Causal Reasoning Favors Encoders: encoder-only models generalize better than decoders at deeper reasoning chains
arXiv:2601.04398 - Attention Head Intervention: causal interpretability requires active intervention, not correlation observation
arXiv:2506.17331 - Epistemic Integrity in Artificial Reasoning: symbol-referent mapping requires external grounding layers
patterns.falsification_condition: If deploying encoder-decoder cross-attention grounding yields no improvement in source-attribution fidelity over decoder-only baseline on material science citation benchmark, P1 is falsified.

patterns.domain: Protein Structure Prediction / Graph Neural Networks
patterns.operational_definition: Pure topological properties (node degree, local edge density, persistent homology descriptors) drive predictive accuracy at orders-of-magnitude lower memory cost than ESM-2 explicit 3D encoders.
patterns.measurement_proxy: R^2 accuracy delta vs. memory footprint (MB); TopoBind topology vs ESM-2-only baselines
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: ESM-2-only LASSO achieves R^2=0.2896 at 2560-dim embeddings; TopoBind hybrid achieves superior R^2 at 256-dim topology representation
empirical_support: arXiv:2508.19632 - TopoBind: 256-dim topology outperforms 2560-dim ESM-2-only (R^2=0.2896 baseline)
PMC12391975 - ESM-2 + Node2Vec GNN: precomputed topological embeddings reduce memory with improved scalability
eLife:98033 - ESM2-t33 (650M params) optimal; 3B-param ESM-2 shows performance degradation — larger semantics != better performance
biorxiv:2025.04.23 - Structure-aware PLMs with efficient topological encoders
patterns.falsification_condition: If topology-only embeddings fail to reach >90% of ESM-2-3B accuracy at <5% memory cost on antibody-antigen ΔG benchmark, P2 is falsified.
expected_artifacts: topology degree vs accuracy CSV matrices

patterns.domain: Radar/LiDAR Sensor Perception / Bayesian Probabilistic Models
patterns.operational_definition: Physical sensor measurement spaces exhibit crescent-shaped, radially asymmetric variance; modeled via heteroscedastic Gaussian with anisotropic covariance in polar coordinates.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Chamfer Distance (CD) reduction %; F-score improvement %; uncertainty ellipsoid eccentricity
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: RaUF BDA ablation: uncertainty calibration reduces CD by 30.55-37.18%, improves F-score by 27.27-38.71%
empirical_support: arXiv:2603.01026 - RaUF: crescent-shaped radar uncertainty approximated by anisotropic Gaussian; BDA reduces false positives via Doppler-spatial fusion
arXiv:2508.03578 - Heteroscedastic aleatoric uncertainty in human pose estimation from radar
arXiv:1809.05590 - Heteroscedastic LiDAR 3D detection: +9% AP over isotropic baseline
patterns.falsification_condition: If isotropic Gaussian uncertainty model matches anisotropic heteroscedastic model performance on multipath ghost suppression, P3 is falsified.

patterns.operational_definition: Fast-timescale Kuramoto oscillatory phase-locking gates slow-timescale Hebbian structural rewiring; synchronization order parameter r(t) acts as threshold for connectivity consolidation.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Macroscopic order parameter r(t); Lyapunov convergence rate; O(n*k) sparsity vs dense attention baseline
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: HOC-L achieves O(n*k) complexity with k<<n; composite Lyapunov function proves convergence to stable equilibrium
empirical_support: arXiv:2603.08731 - HOC-L: first unified Kuramoto + Hebbian dynamical system; synchronization-gated plasticity with proven convergence
arXiv:2504.03102 - Kuramoto associative memory: exponential capacity with network size; phase-locked states encode patterns
arXiv:2601.04362 - Phasor Agents: delayed Kuramoto networks generate triadic interactions
Nature:s44335-024-00015-z - Computing with oscillators: combinatorial optimization to ML algorithms
patterns.falsification_condition: If HOC-L architecture fails to demonstrate emergent cluster-aligned connectivity upon synchronization threshold crossing, P4 is falsified.

patterns.operational_definition: CoT reasoning treated as lossy compression; CIB penalizes redundancy with prompt X while maximizing conditional predictive power for response Y, using semantic surprisal as token cost metric.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Token compression ratio %; reasoning accuracy retention %; semantic surprisal distribution of pruned tokens
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: CIB achieves improved accuracy at moderate compression and reduced degradation under aggressive compression; excises low-surprisal filler while preserving high-entropy CoT peaks
empirical_support: arXiv:2603.08462 - CIB: L_CIB = I(X;Z) - μ*I(Y;Z|X); semantic surprisal filter preserves high-entropy peaks
arXiv:2508.03346 - Step entropy bounds: I(S_j;A|S̄_j) ≤ H(S_j|S<j); low-entropy steps prunable
arXiv:2602.09789 - LLM Scaling Paradox: context compression via IB principle; rank of embeddings drives prior intrusion
arXiv:2601.04362 - Latent CoT: CIB Lagrangian dual; latent vector h_k compresses past reasoning chain
patterns.falsification_condition: If CIB compression eliminates valid logical reasoning peaks alongside scaffolding (validated by accuracy drop >15% on multi-step logical benchmark), P5 is falsified.

patterns.operational_definition: Cross-token attention weight decays approximately as inverse-square of sequence distance; tokens at gravitational distance beyond threshold become 'lost to deep smoothing'; high-degree topological hubs act as gravitational attractors.
patterns.measurement_proxy: Attention weight vs token distance log-log slope; rescue rate of distant tokens when mapped to hub nodes
patterns.task_conditioned_baseline: Tokens in mid-sequence suffer Lost-in-the-Middle attention collapse; L2 norm entity density drops >33% at depth >5 nodes without ContextLock
empirical_support: file:1 - Cross-Domain Autonomy: Lost in the Middle bias; Shannon Entropy concentration marks context topology collapse
arXiv:2601.04398 - Attention head intervention: specific heads causally drive token routing
arXiv:2512.10561 - Decoder curvature drift: autoregressively accumulated noise disrupts higher-order invariants
patterns.falsification_condition: If attention weight decay follows a non-power-law distribution (e.g., exponential) over sequence length, the inverse-square AGF hypothesis is falsified.
expected_artifacts: attention weight vs distance scatter plots
